title: QuickFix Nutty Crunch Stir-Fry
description: A quick-fix British dish featuring nutty crunch and juicy tomato ketchup in a low-carb-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Fresh Vegetables (e.g., Bell Peppers, Carrots)
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly for a crunchier texture

instructions: In a small bowl, mix tomato ketchup with almond flour and water until smooth. Set aside.
Toast mixed nuts in a dry pan for about 2 minutes or until fragrant. Allow to cool slightly before chopping them into small pieces.
Slice fresh vegetables thinly and set aside.
Mix together the prepared tomato ketchup mixture, soy sauce, and garlic powder in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Once the mixture is heated through, add chopped nuts and sliced vegetables. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
